name: Spicy Black Beans with Chilies and Lime
recipeIngredient: 1-1/2 cups dried black beans (about 9 ounces), sorted and soaked overnight
1 or 2 jalapeno chilies, seeded and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and rinse the soaked black beans. Place them in a large saucepan and cover with cold water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and cook at a gentle boil for 20 to 25 minutes, or until tender yet still holding shape.
2. While beans are cooking, bring a small pot of salted water (1/2 teaspoon) to boil. Add carrot and cook for 1 minute, adding celery for at least 30 seconds. Drain immediately and rinse under cold water.
3. Make the dressing by combining lime zest, fresh lime juice, vinegar, garlic, cayenne pepper, 1 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon black pepper in a bowl. Gradually whisk in olive oil.
4. Once beans are tender, drain them well. Toss immediately with the dressing and diced jalapenos. If chilies are very hot, add half the amount to the salad, then adjust to desired spiciness. Marinate for 30 minutes before serving.
5. Season with additional salt and pepper if needed. Add cilantro and mint just before serving.
